# layout.html ## Introduction {% extends "basic/layout.html" %} {%- macro secondnav() %} {%- if prev %} « [previous]({{ prev.link|e }} "{{ prev.title|e }}") {{ reldelim2 }} {%- endif %} {%- if parents %} [up]({{ parents.0.link|e }} "{{ parents.0.title|e }}") {%- else %} [up]({{ pathto\('index'\) }} "{{ docstitle }}") {%- endif %} {%- if next %} {{ reldelim2 }} [next]({{ next.link|e }} "{{ next.title|e }}") » {%- endif %} {%- endmacro %} {% block extrahead %} {# When building htmlhelp (CHM format) disable jQuery inclusion, #} {# as it causes problems in compiled CHM files. #} {% if builder != "htmlhelp" %} {{ super() }} {% endif %} {%- if include\_console\_assets -%} {%- endif -%} {% endblock %} {% block document %} # [{{ docstitle }}]({{ pathto\('index'\) }}) [Home]({{ pathto\('index'\) }} "Home page") {{ reldelim2 }} [Table of contents]({{ pathto\('contents'\) }} "Table of contents") {{ reldelim2 }} [Index]({{ pathto\('genindex'\) }} "Global index") {{ reldelim2 }} [Modules]({{ pathto\('py-modindex'\) }} "Module index") {{ secondnav() }} {% block body %}{% endblock %} {% block sidebarwrapper %} {% if pagename != 'index' %} {{ sidebar() }} {%- if last\_updated %} ### Last update: {{ last\_updated }} {%- endif %} {% endif %} {% endblock %} {{ secondnav() }} {% endblock %} {% block sidebarrel %} ### Browse {% if prev %}* Prev: [{{ prev.title }}]({{ prev.link }}) {% endif %} {% if next %}* Next: [{{ next.title }}]({{ next.link }}) {% endif %} ### You are here: * [{{ docstitle }}]({{ pathto\('index'\) }}) {% for p in parents %} * [{{ p.title }}]({{ p.link }}) {% endfor %} * {{ title }}{% for p in parents %}{% endfor %} {% endblock %} {# Empty some default blocks out #} {% block relbar1 %}{% endblock %} {% block relbar2 %}{% endblock %} {% block sidebar1 %}{% endblock %} {% block sidebar2 %}{% endblock %} {% block footer %}{% endblock %}
